en: You are getting this category because you selected ISO 44001:2017 in the Avetta PQF - ISO Certifications Questionnaire\n\nISO Certificates issued for the a prior standard that are still valid and not expired will be accepted. If your organization also has a country specific certificate that is equivalent to the ISO Standard listed below, that certification will also be accepted as long as it is still valid.
ISO 44001 - Collaborative Business Relationship Management Systems
Please upload your ISO 44001:2017 - Collaborative Business Relationship Management Systems — Requirements and Framework certificate:
Please enter the certificate expiration date:\n
